regions.us-ports: Today in Miami, winds are light from the south at 8 knots with a 12% rain probability and thunderstorms expected, which could require some caution during embarkation and shore excursions. Throughout the region, winds remain moderate and skies will transition from clear to stormy over the next three days, so it is advisable to monitor updates closely.
